name: Wauna
description_short: Wauna Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit credit union serving the Columbia River Communities since 1967, offering savings accounts, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long: Wauna Credit Union has operated as a community-focused financial institution in the Columbia River region for over 55 years, establishing itself as a member-owned cooperative since 1967. The credit union currently serves 26,781 members across 7 physical branches and provides NCUA-insured deposit products and lending services typical of federal credit unions. Their service model emphasizes putting members first and maintaining active participation in local community initiatives, including charitable giving and event sponsorships. The organization operates with a philosophy of 'people helping people,' reflecting the cooperative credit union structure where profits are returned to members rather than external shareholders.
services: Credit cards with competitive interest rates
Credit card balance transfer and consolidation services
Youth savings accounts (Wauna Start Smart program)
Community event sponsorships and charitable giving
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.50% APR as advertised
HELOC rates as low as 6.75% APR
Member-owned cooperative structure returns profits to members rather than shareholders
Over 1,000 annual volunteer hours demonstrating genuine community commitment
Active fraud prevention and member education initiatives
Youth financial literacy program (Wauna Start Smart) for children
cons: Geographic restriction—membership limited to Columbia River Communities region
Limited branch network with only 7 locations may require travel for some members
Vernonia branch daily closure from 1:00 PM–2:00 PM creates service gaps
Website lacks detailed fee schedules and comprehensive rate comparisons across all products
No clear information about digital banking capabilities or mobile app features
best_for: Residents of the Columbia River Communities seeking local banking with member ownership
Consumers with auto loan or home equity financing needs looking for competitive rates
Families wanting youth financial education through structured credit union programs
Community-minded individuals prioritizing local institution support over national chains
diagnosis: Wauna Credit Union is best for residents within the Columbia River Communities seeking competitive loan rates and community-focused banking through a member-owned cooperative structure. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to their service region—out-of-area individuals cannot access membership or services regardless of interest.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Wauna — Credit Union in Clatskanie, OR | CreditDoc
meta_description: Wauna — NCUA-insured credit union in Clatskanie, OR. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
